impact: This advances checkbox-18 by proving the accepted extension lifecycle skeleton fails closed for required facts, required documents, user decisions, authority-source evidence IDs, action-gate citations, and no-live-automation notes while continuing to treat evidence-map category references as category references only.
summary: Add a mutation-focused extension lifecycle validator that rejects single missing skeleton fields after the exact-schema pass.
target_task: Task checkbox-18: Recovery for checkbox-19: after the syntax-first exact-schema validator passes, add only one mutation-focused validator extension that removes one skeleton field at a time for required facts, required documents, user decisions, authority-source evidence IDs, action-gate citations, and no-live-automation notes, without requiring the evidence map to expose top-level evidence IDs.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
